footerDisplay: BM Home connects BMW CarData to Apple Home using BMW CarData API and MQTT streaming.

clientId.title: BMW CarData Client ID
clientId.description: Open in Chrome: https://www.bmw.co.uk/en-gb/mybmw/public/cardata-telematic-catalogue . Log in, open My Vehicle Overview, scroll to BMW CarData, then CarData API. Create a CarData Client and enable both CarData API and CarData Stream.

vin.title: VIN
vin.description: Your VIN is also the BMW CarData Stream topic. Leave blank to use wildcard diagnostics.

enableStreaming.title: Enable MQTT Streaming
enableStreaming.description: Requires CarData Stream to be configured in the BMW portal. In CarData Stream, select the BMHome telematics attributes and save. Connection Details should then populate. BMHome uses Topic = VIN.
